indications.text:
1.1 Septicemia
Vancomycin Injection administered intravenously is indicated in adults and pediatric patients
less than 18 years of age for the treatment of septicemia due to:
• Susceptible isolates of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) and coagulase
negative staphylococci.
